list.name: room
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT room_id FROM events WHERE source='analytics' ORDER BY 1
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT room_id FROM events WHERE source='analytics' ORDER BY 1

panels.title: % покрытия зон движением (протёрто)
panels.description: Доля площади ROI-зоны, покрытая движением, из coverage_report (payload.coverage_pct). Серия — помещение/зона.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS "time", (payload->>'coverage_pct')::float AS "value", concat(room_id, ' / ', payload->>'zone') AS "metric" FROM events WHERE type='coverage_report' AND room_id IN (${room:singlequote}) AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

panels.title: События аналитики
panels.description: pose_event / action_detected / coverage_report / condition_flagged — что распознала видеоаналитика.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS "time", type, room_id AS room, severity, message, payload::text AS payload FROM events WHERE source='analytics' AND room_id IN (${room:singlequote}) AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 500
